_raw:
{
  "summary": "The presenter demonstrates Astria, an AI fashion platform, by showing how to create and modify outfits on a model. They navigate between different views, including a 'Lookbook' with a grid of clothing slots and a 'Zara Yellow dress' page displaying multiple AI-generated images of a dress. The core of the demonstration involves using the 'Lookbook' to select different clothing items (tank top, jeans, shoes) and a background, then generating new images. The presenter also shows how to change the color of an item (jeans from dark blue to light blue) and how the system generates new images based on these selections, showcasing the AI's ability to adapt clothing and backgrounds.",
  "urls_visible": [
    "astria.ai/prompts",
    "astria.ai/zara-yellow-dress",
    "astria.ai/dreambooth-api"
  ],
  "ui_state": "Lookbook cube grid expanded with various clothing and background slots, displaying a model wearing a white tank top, blue jeans, and brown sneakers, with generated images below.",
  "interactions": [
    {
      "t": "00:08",
      "action": "click",
      "target_text": "Zara Yellow dress",
      "target_description": "Browser tab for 'Zara Yellow dress'",
      "outcome": "Navigation to the 'Zara Yellow dress' page, displaying a grid of images of a woman in a yellow dress."
    },
    {
      "t": "00:15",
      "action": "click",
      "target_text": "Astria - Dreambooth API",
      "target_description": "Browser tab for 'Astria - Dreambooth API'",
      "outcome": "Brief navigation to the 'Dreambooth API' page, then immediately back."
    },
    {
      "t": "00:17",
      "action": "click",
      "target_text": "Astria.ai/prompts",
      "target_description": "Browser tab for 'Astria.ai/prompts'",
      "outcome": "Navigation back to the main 'Prompts' page with the Lookbook interface."
    },
    {
      "t": "00:19",
      "action": "click",
      "target_text": "Lookbook",
      "target_description": "Lookbook tab/button",
      "outcome": "The UI switches from a text-based prompt view to a grid of image slots for clothing items and pose."
    },
    {
      "t": "00:33",
      "action": "click",
      "target_text": "Background",
      "target_description": "Background slot in the Lookbook grid",
      "outcome": "A 'Search references' modal window appears, then disappears repeatedly as the presenter clicks it multiple times."
    },
    {
      "t": "00:58",
      "action": "type",
      "target_text": "on a Parisian bridge",
      "target_description": "Text input field for background description",
      "outcome": "The text 'on a Parisian bridge' is entered into the background prompt."
    },
    {
      "t": "01:00",
      "action": "click",
      "target_text": "Describe",
      "target_description": "Describe button",
      "outcome": "The system starts processing to generate new images with the specified background."
    },
    {

      "action": "click",
      "target_text": "Background",

      "outcome": "The 'Search references' modal appears, then disappears."
